title: Ash Growth System
description: A structured Ash growth system with exact per-level species parameters, queue growth, deciduous terminal continuations, taper-coupled child radii, stratified and permuted emergence, final-branch leaf placement, rounded double cards, bark textures, rooted leaf wind, and a complete simplex-patched meadow with grass, flowers, rocks, forest, sky, fog, and daylight.
techniques: shared CPU and shader simplex patch field
textured bark and complete meadow composition
